videoSnippet.title: “It’s Quite Nice to Shut up all the Idiots Who Think That I can’t Play Chess Anymore”

Nakamura, Hikaru (2810) - Caruana, Fabiano (2795)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 | Open (Chess.com) [08] 2026.04.07
A33 English, symmetrical variation

1.c4 c5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 e6 6.Bf4 d5 7.cxd5 Nxd5 8.Nxc6 bxc6 9.Bd2 Bb4 10.Qa4 a5 11.e4 Nxc3 12.bxc3 Be7 13.Be2 O-O 14.Bf4 Ba6 15.Bxa6 Rxa6 16.Rd1 Qb6 17.O-O Qb5 18.Qc2 Bc5 19.c4 Qb7 20.Be5 Qe7 21.Qd3 f6 22.Bd6 Bxd6 23.Qxd6 Qxd6 24.Rxd6 Rb8 25.Rxe6 Rb2 26.Re7 Rab6 27.Ra7 Rxa2 28.h3 h5 29.Rd1 Rbb2 30.Rd8+ Kh7 31.Rdd7 Rxf2 32.Rxg7+ Kh8 33.Rh7+ Kg8 34.Rag7+ Kf8 35.Rf7+ Kg8 36.Rhg7+ Kh8 37.Rg6 Rf4 38.Rfxf6 Rxf6 39.Rxf6 Kg7 40.Rxc6 Rc2 41.Rc5 Kg6 42.Rxa5 Rxc4 43.Re5 h4 44.Kf2 Rc2+ 45.Kf3 Rc3+ 46.Kg4 Rg3+ 47.Kxh4 Rxg2 48.Rf5 Rg1 49.Rf4 Ra1 50.Kg3 Rg1+ 51.Kf3 Rf1+ 52.Ke3 Re1+ 53.Kd4 Ra1 54.Rf5 Rh1 55.Rf3 Ra1 56.h4 Ra4+ 57.Ke5 Ra5+ 58.Kf4 Rh5 59.Kg4 Re5 60.Rf4 Kh6 61.Kf3 Kg6 62.Ke3 Ra5 63.Rg4+ Kf6 64.Rg5 Ra1 65.Rf5+ Kg6 66.h5+ Kh6 67.e5
